Goal: Creating a real-world CMS using Express.js + Vue.js with HMVC structure

[Research findings]
Summary: Developing a CMS with Express.js and Vue.js requires careful planning to ensure scalability, maintainability, and performance. The HMVC (Hierarchical Model-View-Controller) architecture can help manage complexity by organizing code into modules.
Recommended approach: HMVC Architecture
